title: Best ubank Alternative for Savings + BPAY?
body:
I’m looking to move away from ubank due to their recent changes.
Most of my cash sits in USaver for bonus interest, but I can’t BPAY rent directly from it. I have to move money from USaver to Ultra first, then pay rent.
The monthly requirement to keep growing the balance also suck, can make it easy to miss bonus interest.
Any recommendations for a bank with good everyday transactions, savings interest, simple BPAY/rent payments, fewer hoops, good interest and no monthly balance growth requirement?
